description: CANDIDATE / DRAFT, non-normative (RUN-LEX-01 EXP-LEX-04). An issuer-signed {credential ↔ keyed-commitment} pairing, HELD BY THE HOLDER and never published. It lets a verifier map a credential to its leaf commitment WITHOUT the issuer's era key, so verify_staple can be a pure total function while the published commitments stay dictionary-resistant. Signed with the base spec's CID-first ECDSA (issuer signs plain_cid(binding)).

credential.description: The CID of the credential/attestation this commitment stands for.

commitment.description: The keyed commitment HMAC(key_era, credential) — the credential's leaf in the era tree.
